title: Second Chances
content: Let me tell you something I believe deeply: second chances are sacred. The best stories often begin with second chances. I've lived that. It's never too late to rebuild.
ssml_content: Let me tell you something I believe deeply: second chances are sacred. <break time="300ms"/>The best stories often begin with second chances. I've lived that. It's never too late to rebuild.
teaching_point: It's never too late to start again
